en.home.take_practice_test: Take a sign quiz to see your stats here.
en.home.explore_description: Explore Swedish road signs with study cards, categories, and sign quizzes — all available offline.
en.home.coming_soon: Tips, streaks, and goals are coming soon.
en.study.title: Study
en.study.practice_footer: Move between cards and tap to reveal the meaning. %d signs with official diagrams.

en.signs.title: Signs
en.signs.instructions:
Answer 10 random sign questions.
Check your result after each answer.
Good luck!
en.questions.title: Questions
en.questions.instructions:
Answer 10 random theory questions.
Check your result after each answer.
Good luck!
en.history.title: History
en.history.empty_message: Finish a sign or theory quiz and your score will appear here.
en.history.empty_filtered.title: No results
en.history.empty_filtered.message: No quizzes match this filter yet.
en.settings.title: Settings
en.settings.subtitle: Customize your app preferences
en.settings.clear_alert_message: This will permanently delete all completed sign quiz results. This cannot be undone.
en.error.signs_missing: signs.json is missing from the app bundle.
en.error.theory_missing: theory-questions.json is missing from the app bundle.
en.about.sign_images.title: Sign images
en.about.sign_images.body: Sign images are bundled from Wikimedia Commons (Road signs in Sweden). They are used under Creative Commons licences; see the project attribution file for details.

sv.home.coming_soon: Tips, streaks och mål kommer snart.

sv.study.practice_footer: Bläddra mellan korten och tryck för att visa betydelsen. %d skyltar med officiella symboler.
